Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Meat and eggs are essential for building a healthy body, and there's no better choice than chicken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I cooked food an athlete[n]would eat with Sanada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This should last a while. Let's put it in the freezer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Thanks for always helping out. Let me know when you want some more.[n]{f 1 1}
